directions.reason: Lifted muzzle and gaze are unmistakably vertical; hard cardinal passes.

directions.reason: Near-cardinal transition intentionally converges toward 180 without reversal.

review_warnings: Blind ambiguity is limited to intermediate near-cardinal axes; all four hard cardinal pairs pass.
The labeled clockwise sequence resolves the intermediate cues without reversal or identity drift.
Continuity alpha-hole candidates are intentional negative space between feet; metric outliers show no visible snap, clipping, or scale pop.
